channel.title: GitHub HCL Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of HCL in GitHub

item.title: ChristianLempa/boilerplates
item.description: This is my personal template collection. Here you'll find templates, and configurations for various tools, and technologies.

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-rds-cluster
item.description: Terraform module to provision an RDS Aurora cluster for MySQL or Postgres

item.title: hashicorp/terraform-aws-consul
item.description: A Terraform Module for how to run Consul on AWS using Terraform and Packer

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-documentdb-cluster
item.description: Terraform module to provision a DocumentDB cluster on AWS

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-eks
item.description: Terraform module to create Amazon Elastic Kubernetes (EKS) resources 🇺🇦

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-efs
item.description: Terraform Module to define an EFS Filesystem (aka NFS)

item.title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-kms
item.description: Allows managing a keyring, zero or more keys in the keyring, and IAM role bindings on individual keys

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-ses
item.description: Terraform module to provision Simple Email Service on AWS

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-mq-broker
item.description: Terraform module for provisioning an AmazonMQ broker

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-vpc-peering
item.description: Terraform module to create a peering connection between two VPCs in the same AWS account.
